chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P No. D – 842 of 2023 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Fresh case 1. For orders on office objection at flag ‘A’ 2. For orders on CMA No.3551/2023 (Ex.A) 3. For hearing of main case 11-09-2025 On 12-12-2023 the following order was passed;- “Once again time has been sought for compliance of the office objection. By way of a final opportunity, 03 days time is allowed for compliance failing which the petition would stand dismissed automatically without the need of further orders.” Today, none present for the petitioner nor any intimation received. The instant Constitutional petition is pending without any useful progress. The absence on the part of the petitioner and his Counsel prima facie suggests that either the purpose of filing instant Petition has been served or they have lost interest in pursuing the same. Accordingly, the Petition is dismissed for non-prosecution along with listed application. Judge Judge ARBROHI
